bio: GRAMMY-nominated & multi-platinum singer/songwriter Shawn Mendes has released 4 acclaimed studio albums, with his 5th studio album Shawn out now. The new album draws deeply from his travels and experiences over the last few years, following the cancellation of his 2022 tour.

rows: I Know What You Did Last Summer
The Christmas Song (Shawn Mendes & Camila Cabello)
